entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: Platform for structured candidate evaluation, replacing traditional resume-based application

entities.name: Employer portal
entities.context: Recruiter and hiring manager facing interface within Careerspan system

entities.name: Structured conversation process
entities.context: Method where applicants go through guided conversation rather than just uploading resume

entities.name: Narrative summary
entities.context: High-level summary of candidate surfaced to employers

entities.name: Deal-breakers
entities.context: Automatically inferred disqualifying factors from job description (skills gaps, location, seniority mismatches)

entities.name: Why say yes / why say no
entities.context: Actionable guidance framework replacing arbitrary rankings or pedigree signals

entities.name: Voice and story consistency
entities.context: Cross-comparison of interview transcripts with Careerspan responses to verify candidate authenticity

relationships.context: Component of Careerspan system for employer-side functionality
Entry point for applicants instead of resume-only uploads
Surfaces high-level candidate narrative to recruiters
Automatically surfaces inferred deal-breakers from JD matching

relationships.to: Why say yes / why say no
relationships.context: Provides actionable decision guidance to employers
Enables cross-comparison of candidate communications over time
